description_long: This is a rectangular, stone-clad bank building with a neoclassical architectural style, featuring a prominent portico at the front. The facade is adorned with large, fluted columns supporting a triangular pediment, and the entrance is accessed by a short flight of stairs. The roof is flat and bordered by a decorative balustrade with greenish accents, while the walls display a weathered, marbled texture. The side and rear elevations are simpler, with minimal ornamentation and blocked window spaces. The main entrance is highlighted by a greenish, sloped roof canopy and double doors, suggesting a secure and formal entryway. The overall structure appears solid and imposing, typical of traditional bank buildings designed to convey security and stability.
description: A neoclassical stone bank building with a columned portico, greenish roof accents, and a grand, secure entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with columns, triangular pediment, greenish canopy, and double doors.
description_view_1: Rear-side view displaying the plain, marbled wall with minimal decoration and no visible entrance.
description_view_2: Opposite rear-side view, similar to view 1, with blocked window spaces and a simple, unadorned wall.
description_view_3: Angled front view highlighting the entrance portico, stairs, and the decorative roof balustrade.
attribute_entrance_design: Main entrance features a set of double doors beneath a greenish sloped canopy, flanked by large stone columns and accessed by a short staircase; doors appear to be solid and reinforced.
